title: Create: Addon frenzy (DISCONTINUED)
description: Explore the innovative Create Mod and exciting add-ons. Build intricate contraptions, and automate things! DISCONTINUED
body:
![Golden altered minecraft title page saying CREATE: with small golden text under it saying Addon Frenzy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5187685ae437ce1d63597ee7190e3aa4cc0679e2.png)

# Includes Joshua's Optimization
**Sodium, ImmediatelyFast, Dynamic FPS, and others** designed specifically to optimize and enhance your game's performance

# Create at its finest
The Create Mod: All Addons modpack combines a variety of enhancements to elevate your Minecraft gameplay. With new mechanics, tools, and items, players can build complex contraptions and automate processes, unlocking limitless creative possibilities.

# Special thanks to...
ThievishJoke or BaLLducked for the logo! (not the title page, the actual logo)

# Q & A
- How do i report a bug? In our [Github.](https://github.com/Joshua1056/JoshuasModpacks)
